work_experience.title: Machine Learning Engineer
responsibilities: Enhanced model prediction accuracy by 15% by analyzing agent responses on different rubrics and state scenarios.
Transcribed 50+ audio and video files to provide quality training and test data.
Evaluated LLM conversations to assess correctness of tool usage, API calls, and reasoning flow.

projects.name: Smart Product Pricing Model, Amazon ML Challenge 2025
projects.description: Created a NLP and CV pipeline to analyze 150,000 image and text data using transformer-based text encoders and CNN-based image embeddings, integrating them through a fusion neural network for price prediction.
achievements: Implemented data preprocessing, including text cleaning, tokenization, and streaming image feature extraction with ResNet and CLIP representations to handle large dataset.
Applied feature engineering, outlier handling, and SMAPE-based evaluation to optimize prediction accuracy.
Built and fine-tuned models using TensorFlow and scikit-learn, accomplished 142 rank out of 50,000 participants.

projects.name: RAG System
projects.description: Made a production-ready RAG pipeline integrating semantic vector retrieval with LLM generation to produce context-grounded responses.
achievements: Engineered multiple chunking strategies and a scalable ingestion, retrieval, generation flow for efficient semantic search and generation.
Implemented history-aware and multimodal augmentations, and evaluated retrieval outputs to measure relevance and quality.

projects.name: Tailorcv.ai
projects.description: Built an AI web app that tailors resumes to job descriptions using LLMs and NLP pipelines, improving resume relevance by up to 80%.
achievements: Designed a Python and FastAPI backend and HTML CSS and Javascript for frontend and deployed on AWS.
Got 50+ users within the first week of launch, demonstrating strong early adoption and real-world impact.

projects.name: Youtube Sentiment Analysis
projects.description: Created an end-to-end YouTube sentiment analysis pipeline processing 10k+ user comments, improving sentiment classification performance through NLP preprocessing.
achievements: Tracked multiple model experiments using MLflow and DVC, enabling reproducible training and systematic comparison of models built with scikit-learn and NLP libraries.
Deployed the pipeline on AWS using Docker and exposed predictions via Flask REST APIs, enabling scalable and reproducible inference.
Organized national-level flagship events such as E-Summit 2025 and Hult Prize 2025, achieving 5,000+ registrations and 1,000+ on-campus attendees.
Contributed to the establishment of an Incubation Center at Jadavpur University under the Institution’s Innovation Council (IIC).
Led planning and execution of Finspire 2025, a national-level finance event with 1,000+ registrations and 500+ on-ground attendees, strengthening the club’s national presence.
Delivered high-impact trading and investment courses to 100+ students, improving engagement in financial markets.
